meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build, validate, and ship profitable SaaS products faster.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis stems from a lack of technical velocity. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform abstract pain points into rapid, production-ready prototypes. This setup allows you to iterate on market-validated features in real-time, effectively automating the transition from ideation to revenue-generating SaaS MVP.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. As a founder, the inability to bridge the gap between a vague market insight and a functional codebase isn't a lack of creativity—it's a lack of leverage. You are trapped in the 'idea phase' because your friction to ship is too high.

But the paradigm has shifted. With Claude Code acting as your autonomous pair programmer and Antigravity managing the architecture, you no longer need a massive engineering team to validate a concept. We are moving from 'thinking about building' to 'building while thinking.' This tutorial is your blueprint for turning that mental friction into high-velocity code.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop via Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to crystallize your product's core value. We need to define the 'Who' and the 'Why' to ensure your project has immediate market viability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Identify a high-pain, low-complexity problem in the current B2B workflow space. Outline 3 potential MVP features that solve this, focusing on high-revenue potential and fast time-to-market.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Generate a project structure for a SaaS MVP based on [Antigravity Output]'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Avoid the 'boilerplate tax'. Use Claude Code to scaffold a clean, scalable architecture so you can focus on business logic rather than configuration files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a tech stack recommendation for a lean SaaS MVP. Include Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Provide the necessary directory structure for rapid deployment.

steps.title: Implement the Core Revenue Feature
steps.description: Never build 'nice-to-haves' first. Force Claude Code to build the specific feature that users would pay to access immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for [Feature Name] that extracts data from user inputs and converts it into a structured report. Focus on clean, modular code.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /write 'Create the core data processing service for [Feature Name]'

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing for Reliability
steps.description: Founders can't afford bugs. Use Claude Code to generate comprehensive test suites that ensure your MVP is robust enough for early-adopter testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core service created in step 3. Include edge cases for empty inputs and data validation errors.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Pipeline
steps.description: Move from local code to a live URL. Use Claude Code to configure your deployment scripts, ensuring your MVP is reachable by potential customers immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Vercel deployment configuration file that includes environmental variable setup and build commands for our production environment.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Kill Switch' in Antigravity—if a feature takes more than 4 hours to scaffold, scrap it and pivot.
Use Claude Code's '/ask' command to explain complex existing codebases before you attempt to add new features.
Maintain a 'Feature Log' in a simple markdown file; Claude Code can parse this to maintain context across long-running sessions.
Treat your prompts like API documentation; the more specific the input structure, the less hallucination you will encounter.
Automate your feedback loop by having Claude Code generate an 'Issue' file whenever a test fails during the build process.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first 10 users. Use the feedback from those users to feed back into Antigravity for your next iteration cycle.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming, start shipping. Your market is waiting for a solution, and you now have the stack to build it in record time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
